title: Unit tests for Agent Auth API
acceptance_criteria: Tests for account creation: email uniqueness, default tier='hobby'
Tests for agent creation: quota enforcement per tier, token shown once
Tests for token generation: format 'amu_{name}.*', hash storage, multiple tokens
Tests for token verification: valid/invalid/revoked, last_used_at update
Tests for require_scope(): Hobby=passthrough, Pro+ enforces
Tests for rate limiting: per-tier limits enforced, 429 response
Tests for custom scopes: Scale-only registration, Pro/Hobby 403
All tests use mocks (no live Stripe/Redis/DB needed)
pytest passes: cd trading && python -m pytest tests/unit/test_auth_api.py -v --tb=short --timeout=30
